doc_title: LLaMA Beyond English: An Empirical Study on Language Capability Transfer

items.evidence_span: researchers in Natural Language Processing (NLP) have been exploring the fundamental principles of intelligence (Bubeck et al. 2023)
many LLMs like ChatGPT (OpenAI 2022)
PaLM (Anil et al. 2023)
LLaMA (Touvron et al. 2023a)
reasoning (Cobbe et al. 2021)
planning (Huang et al. 2022)
learning from experience (Dong et al. 2023)
Uniform Bar Examination (UBE) (Katz et al. 2023)
coding based on natural language instructions (StabilityAI 2023)
collecting extensive training data for all languages is nearly impossible (Ranta and Goutte 2021)
Taking the representative LLM BLOOM (Scao et al. 2023) as an example
Some researchers collect large-scale data for specific languages of interest and retrain an LLM (Team 2023a)

items.fact: Cui, Yang, and Yao (2023b) is referenced
items.evidence_span: While Cui, Yang, and Yao (2023b) extend original vocabulary and further pretrain LLaMA with 30B Chinese tokens by LoRA (Hu et al. 2021)
LLaMA (Touvron et al. 2023a)
LLaMA2 (Touvron et al. 2023b)

items.fact: Chinese LLaMA (Cui, Yang, and Yao 2023b) is referenced
items.evidence_span: Chinese LLaMA (Cui, Yang, and Yao 2023b)

items.fact: Chinese LLaMA2 (Cui, Yang, and Yao 2023a) is referenced
items.evidence_span: Chinese LLaMA2 (Cui, Yang, and Yao 2023a)
BELLE (Ji et al. 2023): BELLE is a large-scale Chinese instruction tuning dataset developed by Lianjia Tech.
Bactrian-X (Li et al. 2023): Bactrian-X contains instructions and responses across 52 languages to facilitate multilingual instruction tuning.
It is created by translating $67 \mathrm{~K}$ English instructions from Alpaca-52k (Taori et al. 2023)
and Dolly-15k (Conover et al. 2023) datasets into 51 languages
LLM-Eval (Zhang et al. 2023a): LLM-Eval is a manually constructed benchmark for instruction-following evaluation.
C-Eval (Huang et al. 2023b): C-Eval is a Chinese evaluation suite with 13948 exam questions across 52 subjects and 4 difficulty levels from middle school to professional exams.
Gaokao-Bench (Zhang et al. 2023b): GAOKAO-Bench uses 2811 exam questions from Chinese college entrance exams (Gaokao) from 2010-2022 covering all subjects.
For LLM-Eval, we followed the practice of Zhang et al. (2023a)
Despite all thirteen languages being low-resource, these three languages are more frequently used (Scao et al. 2023).
